name: Production Linked Incentive Scheme For Automobile And Auto Component Industry

details: The government of India has approved the scheme “Production Linked Incentive Scheme for Automobile and Auto Components Industry” in India to enhance India’s Manufacturing Capabilities for Advanced Automotive Products. The “Production Linked Incentive Scheme for Automobile and Auto Components Industry” proposes financial incentives to boost domestic manufacturing of Advanced Automotive Technology products and attract investments in the automotive manufacturing value chain.
